headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on EQT, Raises Price Target to $70
summary: Citigroup  analyst Scott Gruber   maintains EQT (NYSE:EQT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $66 to $70.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on EQT, Raises Price Target to $70

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting EQT Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: EQT has underperformed the broader market over the past year, but analysts remain strongly optimistic about its long-term growth trajectory and future earnings potential.
